name: provenance entry validator accepts a fully-formed pr-corpus class entry with all required fields populated
command: printf '{"class":"pr-corpus","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"verbatim_quote":"x","org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"verbatim_quote":"y","org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"verbatim_quote":"z","org":"c","tier":1}],"evidence_count":3,"organizations_count":3}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-provenance.sh" --provenance prov.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
